title: Waste tracking clipboard installed
description: Kitchen waste log started. Will review data after first full week.
author: Lead Consultant

title: Temperature logging system operational
description: Digital thermometer installed in both fridges. Morning and evening logs started. No exceedances in first week.
author: Lead Consultant

title: First follow-up assessment completed
description: Second assessment shows 3 signals resolved, 2 new signals detected. Net improvement.
author: Lead Consultant

title: Allergen matrix posted and staff trained
description: All FOH staff can now answer allergen questions within 10 seconds. Matrix laminated and posted at counter.
author: Lead Consultant

title: Pre-shift briefing standardized
description: 5-minute briefing template created and posted. All shifts now start with specials, stations, and 86 list.
author: Lead Consultant

title: Saturday staffing trial — week 1
description: Tried fixed station assignments during Saturday peak. Table clear time dropped from 8 minutes to under 3. Team feedback positive.
author: Lead Consultant
